
Complete Media Prompt Analyzer API
==================================

Comprehensive media analysis

Key Features
------------

- Reads all Suno CSVs
- Extracts image EXIF data
- Video metadata extraction
- Prompt discovery and cataloging

Module Reference
----------------

.. automodule:: COMPLETE_MEDIA_PROMPT_ANALYZER
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:
   :special-members: __init__

Classes
-------

.. autoclass:: COMPLETE_MEDIA_PROMPT_ANALYZER.CompleteMediaPromptAnalyzer
   :members:
   :special-members: __init__

Examples
--------

Basic Usage
~~~~~~~~~~~

.. code-block:: python

   from COMPLETE_MEDIA_PROMPT_ANALYZER import *
   
   # Example usage here

Advanced Usage
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

.. code-block:: python

   # Advanced example here

API Reference
-------------

Full API documentation with all methods and parameters.
